mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM b_inventory
AND (INSTR(material_name, #{query.searchWord}) OR INSTR(material_code, #{query.searchWord}) OR INSTR(batch_no, #{query.searchWord}))
AND material_id = #{query.materialId}
AND INSTR(material_code, #{query.materialCode})
AND INSTR(material_name, #{query.materialName})
AND INSTR(batch_no, #{query.batchNo})
AND warning_status = #{query.warningStatus}
AND INSTR(storage_location, #{query.storageLocation})
ORDER BY inventory_id DESC
